description: Object detection and counting training data for YOLO/Ollama. Contains user-verified bounding box annotations in YOLO format (class center_x center_y width height, normalized 0-1).
systemPrompt: You are an expert at detecting and counting symbols/objects on architectural and engineering drawings. The user has selected a template symbol and you need to find all matching instances. Return bounding box annotations in YOLO format.
exampleInstruction: Count all instances of the selected symbol on the drawing and provide YOLO-format bounding boxes
